title: gilia heterophylla
intro: Gilias are a genus of flowering plants, and Gilia heterophylla, also known as the varyleaf gilia, is a species within this group. Gilia heterophylla is native to North America and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant contains compounds like sesquiterpene lactones and iridoid glycosides, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Gilia heterophylla can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions.
